bio: Expert plumber with 12 years of experience in residential and commercial properties. Specialize in leak repairs, pipe fitting, and drainage work.
Professional painter offering interior and exterior painting services. Expert in Asian Paints and Berger paints application.
Licensed electrician handling wiring, switchboard, fan fitting, and MCB work for homes and offices.
Skilled carpenter for furniture assembly, door-window fitting, and custom woodwork. Works with plywood, hardwood, and MDF.
Waterproofing specialist for terraces, bathrooms, and basements using professional-grade chemicals and techniques.
Deep cleaning expert for homes, villas, and offices. Specializes in sofa cleaning, carpet shampooing, and kitchen deep cleaning.
Professional tile installation for floors, bathrooms, and kitchens. Handles ceramic, porcelain, and vitrified tiles.
Putty and plaster specialist for wall preparation before painting. Ensures smooth and even surfaces using Birla and JK cement putty.
Multi-service handyman for homes. Handles plumbing, electrical, painting, and minor repairs. One-call solution for all home needs.
Reliable plumber for all pipe-related issues. Expert in fitting, joint repairs, and bathroom fixture installation.
Wall painting specialist using roller and spray techniques. Offers texture painting, waterproof coating, and enamel finish.
Expert electrician for home wiring, switchboard fitting, and appliance installation. Provides safety certificates after work.
Custom furniture maker and carpenter. Builds wardrobes, TV units, modular kitchens, and does all types of wood repair.
Waterproofing contractor for residential and commercial buildings. Uses torch-applied membranes and liquid waterproofing.
Professional home cleaning services including deep cleaning, post-construction cleaning, and fumigation treatment.
Tile and marble fitting expert. Handles floor leveling, tile cutting, and grouting with precision.
Wall putty and plastering contractor. Expert in external wall putty, pop false ceiling, and decorative plaster.
All-in-one home repair and maintenance. Handles plumbing, electrical, carpentry, painting, and waterproofing jobs.
Experienced plumber for bathroom remodeling, kitchen fitting, and water tank installation and repair.
Pipe fitting and drainage specialist. Expert in sewer line cleaning, bathroom pipe repair, and water heater installation.
Premium painting services for homes. Offers texture walls, designer stripes, and waterproof coat application.
Industrial and residential electrician. Specializes in new wiring, old rewiring, and electrical panel upgrades.
Furniture repair and restoration specialist. Expert in polish finishing, wood polishing, and antique restoration.
Full-service home maintenance company. Team of experts for plumbing, electrical, painting, waterproofing, and cleaning.
Specialized in tile and stone work. Handles mosaic, granite, and Italian marble installation with precision.
Plumbing and water tank cleaning contractor. Offers submersible pump repair, motor installation, and pipe leakage fix.
Paint and decorator specialist. Expert in emulsion, distemper, enamel, and PU finish for all surfaces.
Electrical wiring and fitting expert for new constructions and renovations. Provides earthing and safety solutions.
Bathroom and kitchen plumbing specialist. Expert in fitting showers, faucets, sinks, and热水 heater connections.
Commercial and residential painter. Offers roof heat reflective coating, waterproof pain, and anti-fungal wall paint.
